---
title: "Project title"
description: "Brief description for search engines and previews."
categories: [R, MEL, Global Health]
---

## Problem

Describe the practical question, decision, or gap.

## Data and methods

Describe the data sources, tools, and analytical approach.

## Results

Summarize the main findings, outputs, or decisions supported.

## Reproducibility

- Code:
- RPubs:
- Report or dashboard:
